pdf.head:
<#if .locale=="zh_CN">
<#elseif .locale=="zh_TW">
<#elseif .locale=="ja_JP">
<#elseif .locale=="ko_KR">
<#elseif .locale=="th_TH">
</#if>
pdf.body:
<#list records as check>


<#if check.subsidiary.id == "13">

<#assign applyLength    = check.apply?size>
<#assign creditLength   = check.credit?size>
<#assign combinedLength = applyLength + creditLength>
<#assign otherTotalAmt  = 0>
<#assign otherTotalDisc = 0>

<#list check.apply as apply>
<#assign otherTotalAmt  = otherTotalAmt  + nsformat_number(apply.amount)>
<#assign otherTotalDisc = otherTotalDisc + nsformat_number(apply.disc)>
</#list>

<#list check.credit as credit>
<#assign otherTotalAmt  = otherTotalAmt  + nsformat_number(credit.amount)>
<#assign otherTotalDisc = otherTotalDisc + nsformat_number(credit.discamt)>
        </#list>




<#assign ctr1 = 1>

<#if check.apply?has_content>

    
    <#list check.apply as apply>
    <#if ctr1 lt 11>
    <#if apply_index == 0>
    
        

            ${apply.applydate@label}
            ${apply.type@label}
            ${apply.refnum@label}
            ${apply.total@label}
            ${apply.due@label}
            ${apply.disc@label}
            ${apply.amount@label}
        
    
</#if>


    ${apply.applydate}
    ${apply.type}
    ${apply.refnum}
    ${apply.total}
    ${apply.due}
    ${apply.disc}
    ${apply.amount}

</#if>
<#assign ctr1 = ctr1 + 1>
        </#list>
        

        
<#list check.credit as credit>
<#if ctr1 lt 11>


${credit.creditdate}
${credit.type}
${credit.refnum}
${credit.description}
(${credit.amount})
${credit.discamt}
(${credit.amount})

        </#if>
<#assign ctr1 = ctr1 + 1>
        </#list>
        

        


CHECK TOTAL:
${otherTotalDisc?string.currency}
${otherTotalAmt?string.currency}






    







    


    <#if check.account.id == "984" || check.account.id == "985">
    
        <#else>
        
        </#if>
        

            ${check.checknumber}
        
    

    <#if check.account.id == "984" || check.account.id == "985">
    
        <#else>
        
        </#if>
        

            ${check.trandate}
        
    

    <#if check.account.id == "984" || check.account.id == "985">
    
    <#else>
    
    </#if>
    

    
        <#if (check.entity.companyname?has_content)>
        ${check.entity.companyname}
        <#else>
        ${check.entity}
    </#if>


        

<#if check.account.id == "984" || check.account.id == "985">

<#else>

</#if>


    
        <#if (check.usertotal?length > 0)>
        ${check.usertotal?string['#,###,##0.00']}
        <#else>
        ${check.total?string['#,###,##0.00']}
    </#if>


        

<#if check.account.id == "984" || check.account.id == "985">

<#else>

</#if>


    
        <#-- ${check.totalwords}********************************************************************* -->
    



<#if check.account.id == "984" || check.account.id == "985">

<#else>

</#if>


    
        <#if (check.entity.address?has_content)>
        ${check.entity.address}
        <#else>
        ${check.entity}
    </#if>


        

        
        
        

        
        </#if>

        

        



<#assign ctr2 = 1>

<#if check.apply?has_content>

    
    <#list check.apply as apply>
    <#if ctr2 lt 7>
    <#if apply_index == 0>
    
        

            
                

            
        
        

            ${apply.applydate@label}
            ${apply.type@label}
            ${apply.refnum@label}
            ${apply.total@label}
            ${apply.due@label}
            ${apply.disc@label}
            ${apply.amount@label}
        
    
</#if>


    ${apply.applydate}
    ${apply.type}
    ${apply.refnum}
    ${apply.total}
    ${apply.due}
    ${apply.disc}
    ${apply.amount}

<#elseif ctr2 == 8>


    
        See Transmittal Sheet for check details.
    

<#break>
</#if>

<#assign ctr2 = ctr2 + 1>
        </#list>
        

        
<#list check.credit as credit>
<#assign ctr2 = ctr2 + 1>

<#if ctr2 lt 7>


${credit.creditdate}
${credit.type}
${credit.refnum}
${credit.description}
(${credit.amount})
${credit.discamt}
(${credit.amount})

<#elseif ctr2 == 8>



    See Transmittal Sheet for check details.


<#break>
        </#if>
        </#list>
        

        


CHECK TOTAL:
${otherTotalDisc?string.currency}
${otherTotalAmt?string.currency}


        
        </#if>

        

<#elseif check.subsidiary.id == "29">




<#assign applyLength    = check.apply?size>
<#assign creditLength   = check.credit?size>
<#assign combinedLength = applyLength + creditLength>
<#assign otherTotalAmt  = 0>
<#assign otherTotalDisc = 0>

<#list check.apply as apply>
<#assign otherTotalAmt  = otherTotalAmt  + nsformat_number(apply.amount)>
<#assign otherTotalDisc = otherTotalDisc + nsformat_number(apply.disc)>
        </#list>

<#list check.credit as credit>
<#assign otherTotalAmt  = otherTotalAmt  + nsformat_number(credit.amount)>
<#assign otherTotalDisc = otherTotalDisc + nsformat_number(credit.discamt)>
        </#list>

        



<#assign ctr1 = 1>

<#if check.apply?has_content>

    
    <#list check.apply as apply>
    <#if ctr1 lt 11>
    <#if apply_index == 0>
    
        

            ${apply.applydate@label}
            ${apply.type@label}
            ${apply.refnum@label}
            ${apply.total@label}
            ${apply.due@label}
            ${apply.disc@label}
            ${apply.amount@label}
        
    
</#if>


    ${apply.applydate}
    ${apply.type}
    ${apply.refnum}
    ${apply.total}
    ${apply.due}
    ${apply.disc}
    ${apply.amount}

</#if>
<#assign ctr1 = ctr1 + 1>
        </#list>
        

        
<#list check.credit as credit>
<#if ctr1 lt 11>


${credit.creditdate}
${credit.type}
${credit.refnum}
${credit.description}
(${credit.amount})
${credit.discamt}
(${credit.amount})

        </#if>
<#assign ctr1 = ctr1 + 1>
        </#list>
        

        


CHECK TOTAL:
${otherTotalDisc?string.currency}
${otherTotalAmt?string.currency}






    




        



    


    <#if check.account.id == "984" || check.account.id == "985">
    
        <#else>
        
        </#if>
        

            ${check.checknumber}
        
    

    <#if check.account.id == "984" || check.account.id == "985">
    
    <#else>
    
    </#if>
    

    
        ${check.trandate}
        <#if (check.usertotal?length > 0)>
        
            ${check.usertotal?string['#,###,##0.00']}
        
        <#else>
        
            ${check.total?string['#,###,##0.00']}
        
    </#if>


        

<#if check.account.id == "984" || check.account.id == "985">

<#else>

</#if>


    
        <#if (check.entity.companyname?has_content)>
        ${check.entity.companyname}
        <#else>
        ${check.entity}
    </#if>


        
<#--
<#if check.account.id == "984" || check.account.id == "985">

<#else>

</#if>


    
        <#if (check.usertotal?length > 0)>
        ${check.usertotal?string['#,###,##0.00']}
        <#else>
        ${check.total?string['#,###,##0.00']}
    </#if>


        
        -->
<#if check.account.id == "984" || check.account.id == "985">

<#else>

</#if>


    
        ${check.totalwords}*********************************************************************
    



<#if check.account.id == "984" || check.account.id == "985">

<#else>

</#if>


    
        <#if check.address?contains("United States")>
        ${check.address?replace("United States","")}
        <#else>
        ${check.address}
    </#if>


        

        
        
        

        
        </#if>

        

        



<#assign ctr2 = 1>

<#if check.apply?has_content>

    
    <#list check.apply as apply>
    <#if ctr2 lt 11>
    <#if apply_index == 0>
    
        

            
                

            
        
        

            ${apply.applydate@label}
            ${apply.type@label}
            ${apply.refnum@label}
            ${apply.total@label}
            ${apply.due@label}
            ${apply.disc@label}
            ${apply.amount@label}
        
    
</#if>


    ${apply.applydate}
    ${apply.type}
    ${apply.refnum}
    ${apply.total}
    ${apply.due}
    ${apply.disc}
    ${apply.amount}

</#if>
<#assign ctr2 = ctr2 + 1>
        </#list>
        

        
<#list check.credit as credit>
<#if ctr2 lt 11>


${credit.creditdate}
${credit.type}
${credit.refnum}
${credit.description}
(${credit.amount})
${credit.discamt}
(${credit.amount})

        </#if>
<#assign ctr2 = ctr2 + 1>
        </#list>
        

        


CHECK TOTAL:
${otherTotalDisc?string.currency}
${otherTotalAmt?string.currency}


        
        </#if>

        






<#elseif check.subsidiary.id == '19'>








    <#assign totalAmt = 0>
    <#assign totalAmtCheck = 0>
    <#assign totalOrgAmount = 0>
    <#assign totalDiscTaken = 0>
    <#assign totalPayment = 0>
    <#assign totalDisc = 0>
    <#assign totalCredit = 0>
    <#assign ctr_main = 0 />
    <#list check.apply as apply>
    <#assign ctr_main = ctr_main + 1 />
    <#assign totalAmt = totalAmt + nsformat_number(apply.amount)>
    <#assign totalAmtCheck = totalAmtCheck + nsformat_number(apply.amount)>
    <#assign totalDisc = totalDisc + nsformat_number(apply.disc)>
</#list>
<#list check.credit as credit>
<#assign ctr_main = ctr_main + 1 />
<#assign totalAmt = totalAmt + nsformat_number(credit.amount)>
<#assign totalDisc = totalDisc + nsformat_number(credit.discamt)>
</#list>



    ${check.checknumber}






    ${check.trandate}






    <#if (check.entity.companyname?has_content)>${check.entity.companyname}<#else>${check.entity}
    </#if>


        
<#assign applyLength = check.apply?size>
<#assign creditLength = check.credit?size>
<#assign combinedLength = applyLength + creditLength>
<#assign ctr = 1>
<#if check.apply?has_content || check.credit?has_content>

<#if ctr_main lt 11>

<#list check.apply as apply>
<#if ctr lt 11>
<#if apply_index==0>

    

        Date Due
        Type
        Ref No.
        Installment Ref No.
        Orig. Amount
        Disc. Taken
        Credit
        Payment
    

</#if>


${apply.duedate}
${apply.type}
${apply.refnum}
${apply.appliedto}
${apply.total}
${apply.disc}
 
${apply.amount}

<#assign totalOrgAmount = totalOrgAmount + nsformat_number(apply.total)>
<#assign totalDiscTaken = totalDiscTaken + nsformat_number(apply.disc)>
<#assign totalPayment = totalPayment + nsformat_number(apply.amount)>

        </#if>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1>
        </#list>
        
<#list check.credit as credit>
<#if ctr < 11>


${credit.creditdate}
${credit.type}
${credit.refnum}
${credit.appliedto}
- ${credit.amount}
 
${credit.amount}
$0.00
<#assign totalCredit = totalCredit + nsformat_number(credit.amount)>



        </#if>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1>
        </#list>
        



    CHECK TOTAL:


    


    ${totalOrgAmount?string.currency}


    ${totalDiscTaken?string.currency}


    ${totalCredit?string.currency}


    ${totalPayment?string.currency}





<#else>


See Continuation Sheet

    CHECK TOTAL: ${totalAmtCheck?string.currency}


        </#if>
        
        </#if>
        
        



    

        ${check.checknumber}
    



    

        ${check.trandate}
    



    

        
            <#if (check.usertotal?length> 0)>${check.usertotal}<#else>${check.total}
        </#if>
    






    ${check.totalwords}
    






    <#if check.address?contains("United States")>${check.address?replace("United States","")}<#else>${check.address}
    </#if>


        
        
        



    

        ${check.checknumber}
    



    

        ${check.trandate}
    



    

        <#if (check.entity.companyname?has_content)>${check.entity.companyname}<#else>${check.entity}
        </#if>
    



<#assign applyLength = check.apply?size>
<#assign creditLength = check.credit?size>
<#assign combinedLength = applyLength + creditLength>
<#assign ctr = 1>
<#if check.apply?has_content || check.credit?has_content>

<#if ctr_main lt 11>

<#list check.apply as apply>
<#if ctr lt 11>
<#if apply_index==0>

    

        Date Due
        Type
        Ref No.
        Installment Ref No.
        Orig. Amount
        Disc. Taken
        Credit
        Payment
    

</#if>


${apply.duedate}
${apply.type}
${apply.refnum}
${apply.appliedto}
${apply.total}
${apply.disc}
 
${apply.amount}


        </#if>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1>
        </#list>
        
<#list check.credit as credit>
<#if ctr < 11>


${credit.creditdate}
${credit.type}
${credit.refnum}
${credit.appliedto}
- ${credit.amount}
 
${credit.amount}
$0.00



        </#if>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1>
        </#list>
        



    CHECK TOTAL:


    


    ${totalOrgAmount?string.currency}


    ${totalDiscTaken?string.currency}


    ${totalCredit?string.currency}


    ${totalPayment?string.currency}





<#else>


See Continuation Sheet

    CHECK TOTAL: ${totalAmtCheck?string.currency}


        </#if>
        
        </#if>
        
        



        
<#elseif check.subsidiary.id == '20'>












<#assign lines = check.address?split("\n")>
<#assign newAddress = "">
<#list lines as l>
<#if l_index != 0>
<#if newAddress == "">
<#assign newAddress = l>
<#else>
<#assign newAddress = newAddress + "\n" + l>
</#if>
        </#if>
        </#list>




    
        
        
    

    
        <#--    ${check.entity.printoncheckas} -->
    






     <#--   ${check.checknumber} -->






    ${check.trandate}






    
        ${check.entity.printoncheckas}


    






    ${check.totalwords?capitalize}**************************************************






    
        <#if check.address?contains("United States")>${check.address?replace("United States","")}
        <#else>${check.address}

    </#if>


        






    
        <#if (check.usertotal?length > 0)>
        ${check.usertotal}
        <#else>
        ${check.total}
    </#if>


        

        








<#assign applyLength = check.apply?size>
<#assign creditLength = check.credit?size>
<#assign combinedLength = applyLength + creditLength>
<#assign stubTotalAmt = 0>
<#assign stubTotalDisc = 0>
<#assign applyTotal = 0>
<#assign creditTotal = 0>
<#list check.apply as apply>
<#assign stubTotalAmt = stubTotalAmt + nsformat_number(apply.amount)>
<#assign stubTotalDisc = stubTotalDisc + nsformat_number(apply.disc)>
<#assign applyTotal += apply.amount>
</#list>
<#list check.credit as credit>
<#assign stubTotalAmt = stubTotalAmt + nsformat_number(credit.amount)>
<#assign stubTotalDisc = stubTotalDisc + nsformat_number(credit.discamt)>
<#assign creditTotal += credit.amount>
        </#list>

<#if check.apply?has_content>

<#if combinedLength lt 8>

<#list check.apply as apply>
<#if apply_index==0>

    

        ${apply.applydate@label}
        ${apply.type@label}
        ${apply.refnum@label}
        Amount
        
        ${apply.disc@label}
        Due After Discount
    

</#if>


${apply.applydate}
${apply.type}
${apply.refnum}
${apply.total}

${apply.disc}
${apply.amount}

        </#list>
        



    BILL TOTAL:

 

    ${applyTotal?string.currency}



        


 

        

<#list check.credit as credit>
<#if credit_index == 0>


${credit.creditdate@label}
${credit.type@label}
${credit.refnum@label}
Open CM Amount

        </#if>


${credit.creditdate}
${credit.type}
${credit.refnum}
(${credit.amount})

        </#list>
        



    CREDIT MEMO TOTAL:


     


    ${creditTotal?string.currency}





    CHECK AMOUNT ROW:


     


    ${(applyTotal-creditTotal)?string.currency}


<#else>


Please see next page for complete list of bills

    CHECK TOTAL:


        </#if>
        
        </#if>

<#if check.item?has_content || check.expense?has_content>

<#list check.expense as expense>


    ${expense.account}
    ${expense.date}
    ${expense.description}
    ${expense.amount}

</#list>
<#list check.item as item>



${item.date}
${item.item}, ${item.description}
${item.amount}

        </#list>
        
        </#if>



    


        
        
        



















<#elseif check.subsidiary.id == "21">









    

        ${check.trandate}
    



    

        <#if (check.entity.companyname?has_content)>${check.entity.companyname}<#else>${check.entity}
        </#if>
    






    
        <#if (check.usertotal?length> 0)>${check.usertotal?string['#,###,##0.00']}
        <#else>${check.total?string['#,###,##0.00']}
    </#if>


        





    ${check.totalwords}<#if check.totalwords?length lt 30>***************************************<#elseif
        check.totalwords?length gt 30 && check.totalwords?length lt 40 >*************************************
        <#else>*****************************
    </#if>




        




    <#if check.address?contains("United States")>${check.address?replace("United States","")}<#else>${check.address}
    </#if>


        
        





    

        ${check.trandate}
    



    

        <#if (check.entity.companyname?has_content)>${check.entity.companyname}<#else>${check.entity}
        </#if>
    



<#assign applyLength = check.apply?size>
<#assign creditLength = check.credit?size>
<#assign combinedLength = applyLength + creditLength>
<#assign ctr = 1>
<#assign llrTotalAmt = 0>
<#assign llrTotalDisc = 0>
<#list check.apply as apply>
<#assign llrTotalAmt = llrTotalAmt + nsformat_number(apply.amount)>
<#assign llrTotalDisc = llrTotalDisc + nsformat_number(apply.disc)>
        </#list>
<#list check.credit as credit>
<#assign llrTotalAmt = llrTotalAmt + nsformat_number(credit.amount)>
<#assign llrTotalDisc = llrTotalDisc + nsformat_number(credit.discamt)>
        </#list>

<#if check.apply?has_content>


<#list check.apply as apply>
<#if ctr lt 11>
<#if apply_index==0>

    

        ${apply.applydate@label}
        ${apply.type@label}
        ${apply.refnum@label}
        ${apply.total@label}
        ${apply.due@label}
        ${apply.disc@label}
        ${apply.amount@label}
    

</#if>


${apply.applydate}
${apply.type}
${apply.refnum}
${apply.total}
${apply.due}
${apply.disc}
${apply.amount}

        </#if>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1>
        </#list>
        
        
<#list check.credit as credit>
<#if ctr lt 11>


${credit.creditdate}
${credit.type}
${credit.refnum}
${credit.description}
(${credit.amount})
${credit.discamt}
(${credit.amount})

        </#if>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1>
        </#list>
        
        



    CHECK TOTAL:


    ${llrTotalDisc?string.currency}


    ${llrTotalAmt?string.currency}


<#if combinedLength gt 20>


Please see vendor remittance for complete list of bills

        </#if>
        
        </#if>

<#if check.item?has_content || check.expense?has_content>

<#list check.expense as expense>


    ${expense.account}
    ${expense.date}
    ${expense.description}
    ${expense.amount}

</#list>
<#list check.item as item>


 
${item.date}
${item.item}, ${item.description}
${item.amount}

        </#list>
        
        </#if>
        




    

        ${check.trandate}
    



    

        <#if (check.entity.companyname?has_content)>${check.entity.companyname}<#else>${check.entity}
        </#if>
    



<#assign applyLength = check.apply?size>
<#assign creditLength = check.credit?size>
<#assign combinedLength = applyLength + creditLength>
<#assign ctr = 1>
<#if check.apply?has_content>


<#list check.apply as apply>
<#if ctr lt 11>
<#if apply_index==0>

    

        ${apply.applydate@label}
        ${apply.type@label}
        ${apply.refnum@label}
        ${apply.total@label}
        ${apply.due@label}
        ${apply.disc@label}
        ${apply.amount@label}
    

</#if>


${apply.applydate}
${apply.type}
${apply.refnum}
${apply.total}
${apply.due}
${apply.disc}
${apply.amount}

        </#if>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1>
        </#list>
        
<#list check.credit as credit>
<#if ctr < 11>


${credit.creditdate}
${credit.type}
${credit.refnum}
${credit.description}
(${credit.amount})
${credit.discamt}
(${credit.amount})

        </#if>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1>
        </#list>
        
        



    CHECK TOTAL:


    ${llrTotalDisc?string.currency}


    ${llrTotalAmt?string.currency}


<#if combinedLength gt 20>


Please see vendor remittance for complete list of bills

        </#if>
        
        </#if>

<#if check.item?has_content || check.expense?has_content>

<#list check.expense as expense>


    ${expense.account}
    ${expense.date}
    ${expense.description}
    ${expense.amount}

</#list>
<#list check.item as item>


 
${item.date}
${item.item}, ${item.description}
${item.amount}

        </#list>
        
        </#if>
        

























<#elseif check.subsidiary.id == "45" || check.subsidiary.id == "46" || check.subsidiary.id == "47" || check.subsidiary.id == "48">


<#-- PRINT ON PAGE 1 AND PAGE 2 (NO MACROS). SAME LAYOUT TWICE. -->
<#-- PAGE 1 -->







    

        ${check.trandate}
    



    

        <#if (check.entity.companyname?has_content)>${check.entity.companyname}<#else>${check.entity}
        </#if>
    






    
        <#if (check.usertotal?length> 0)>${check.usertotal?string['#,###,##0.00']}
        <#else>${check.total?string['#,###,##0.00']}
    </#if>


        




    ${check.totalwords}<#if check.totalwords?length lt 30>***************************************<#elseif
        check.totalwords?length gt 30 && check.totalwords?length lt 40 >*************************************<#else>*****************************
    </#if>


        




    <#if check.address?contains("United States")>${check.address?replace("United States","")}<#else>${check.address}
    </#if>


        
        





    

        ${check.trandate}
    



    

        <#if (check.entity.companyname?has_content)>${check.entity.companyname}<#else>${check.entity}
        </#if>
    



<#assign applyLength = check.apply?size>
<#assign creditLength = check.credit?size>
<#assign combinedLength = applyLength + creditLength>
<#assign ctr = 1>
<#assign llrTotalAmt = 0>
<#assign llrTotalDisc = 0>
<#list check.apply as apply>
<#assign llrTotalAmt = llrTotalAmt + nsformat_number(apply.amount)>
<#assign llrTotalDisc = llrTotalDisc + nsformat_number(apply.disc)>
        </#list>
<#list check.credit as credit>
<#assign llrTotalDisc = llrTotalDisc + nsformat_number(credit.discamt)>
        </#list>

<#if check.apply?has_content>


<#list check.apply as apply>
<#if ctr lt 11>
<#if apply_index==0>

    

        ${apply.applydate@label}
        ${apply.type@label}
        ${apply.refnum@label}
        ${apply.total@label}
        ${apply.due@label}
        ${apply.disc@label}
        ${apply.amount@label}
    

</#if>


${apply.applydate}
${apply.type}
${apply.refnum}
${apply.total}
${apply.due}
${apply.disc}
${apply.amount}

        </#if>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1>
        </#list>
        
        
<#list check.credit as credit>
<#if ctr lt 11>


${credit.creditdate}
${credit.type}
${credit.refnum}
${credit.description}
(${credit.amount})
${credit.discamt}
(${credit.amount})

        </#if>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1>
        </#list>
        
        



    CHECK TOTAL:


    ${llrTotalDisc?string.currency}


    ${llrTotalAmt?string.currency}


<#if combinedLength gt 10>


Please see vendor remittance for complete list of bills

        </#if>
        
        </#if>

<#if check.item?has_content || check.expense?has_content>

<#list check.expense as expense>


    ${expense.account}
    ${expense.date}
    ${expense.description}
    ${expense.amount}

</#list>
<#list check.item as item>


 
${item.date}
${item.item}, ${item.description}
${item.amount}

        </#list>
        
        </#if>
        




    

        ${check.trandate}
    



    

        <#if (check.entity.companyname?has_content)>${check.entity.companyname}<#else>${check.entity}
        </#if>
    



<#assign applyLength = check.apply?size>
<#assign creditLength = check.credit?size>
<#assign combinedLength = applyLength + creditLength>
<#assign ctr = 1>
<#if check.apply?has_content>


<#list check.apply as apply>
<#if ctr lt 11>
<#if apply_index==0>

    

        ${apply.applydate@label}
        ${apply.type@label}
        ${apply.refnum@label}
        ${apply.total@label}
        ${apply.due@label}
        ${apply.disc@label}
        ${apply.amount@label}
    

</#if>


${apply.applydate}
${apply.type}
${apply.refnum}
${apply.total}
${apply.due}
${apply.disc}
${apply.amount}

        </#if>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1>
        </#list>
        
<#list check.credit as credit>
<#if ctr < 11>


${credit.creditdate}
${credit.type}
${credit.refnum}
${credit.description}
(${credit.amount})
${credit.discamt}
(${credit.amount})

        </#if>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1>
        </#list>
        
        



    CHECK TOTAL:


    ${llrTotalDisc?string.currency}


    ${llrTotalAmt?string.currency}


<#if combinedLength gt 10>


Please see vendor remittance for complete list of bills

        </#if>
        
        </#if>

<#if check.item?has_content || check.expense?has_content>

<#list check.expense as expense>


    ${expense.account}
    ${expense.date}
    ${expense.description}
    ${expense.amount}

</#list>
<#list check.item as item>


 
${item.date}
${item.item}, ${item.description}
${item.amount}

        </#list>
        
        </#if>
        
        
        


 

<#-- PAGE 2 -->




    

        ${check.trandate}
    



    

        <#if (check.entity.companyname?has_content)>${check.entity.companyname}<#else>${check.entity}
        </#if>
    






    
        <#if (check.usertotal?length> 0)>${check.usertotal?string['#,###,##0.00']}
        <#else>${check.total?string['#,###,##0.00']}
    </#if>


        




    ${check.totalwords}<#if check.totalwords?length lt 30>***************************************<#elseif
        check.totalwords?length gt 30 && check.totalwords?length lt 40 >*************************************<#else>*****************************
    </#if>


        




    <#if check.address?contains("United States")>${check.address?replace("United States","")}<#else>${check.address}
    </#if>


        
        





    

        ${check.trandate}
    



    

        <#if (check.entity.companyname?has_content)>${check.entity.companyname}<#else>${check.entity}
        </#if>
    



<#assign applyLength = check.apply?size>
<#assign creditLength = check.credit?size>
<#assign combinedLength = applyLength + creditLength>
<#assign ctr = 1>
<#assign llrTotalAmt = 0>
<#assign llrTotalDisc = 0>
<#list check.apply as apply>
<#assign llrTotalAmt = llrTotalAmt + nsformat_number(apply.amount)>
<#assign llrTotalDisc = llrTotalDisc + nsformat_number(apply.disc)>
        </#list>
<#list check.credit as credit>
<#assign llrTotalDisc = llrTotalDisc + nsformat_number(credit.discamt)>
        </#list>

<#if check.apply?has_content>


<#list check.apply as apply>
<#if ctr lt 11>
<#if apply_index==0>

    

        ${apply.applydate@label}
        ${apply.type@label}
        ${apply.refnum@label}
        ${apply.total@label}
        ${apply.due@label}
        ${apply.disc@label}
        ${apply.amount@label}
    

</#if>


${apply.applydate}
${apply.type}
${apply.refnum}
${apply.total}
${apply.due}
${apply.disc}
${apply.amount}

        </#if>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1>
        </#list>
        
        
<#list check.credit as credit>
<#if ctr lt 11>


${credit.creditdate}
${credit.type}
${credit.refnum}
${credit.description}
(${credit.amount})
${credit.discamt}
(${credit.amount})

        </#if>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1>
        </#list>
        
        



    CHECK TOTAL:


    ${llrTotalDisc?string.currency}


    ${llrTotalAmt?string.currency}


<#if combinedLength gt 10>


Please see vendor remittance for complete list of bills

        </#if>
        
        </#if>

<#if check.item?has_content || check.expense?has_content>

<#list check.expense as expense>


    ${expense.account}
    ${expense.date}
    ${expense.description}
    ${expense.amount}

</#list>
<#list check.item as item>


 
${item.date}
${item.item}, ${item.description}
${item.amount}

        </#list>
        
        </#if>
        




    

        ${check.trandate}
    



    

        <#if (check.entity.companyname?has_content)>${check.entity.companyname}<#else>${check.entity}
        </#if>
    



<#assign applyLength = check.apply?size>
<#assign creditLength = check.credit?size>
<#assign combinedLength = applyLength + creditLength>
<#assign ctr = 1>
<#if check.apply?has_content>


<#list check.apply as apply>
<#if ctr lt 11>
<#if apply_index==0>

    

        ${apply.applydate@label}
        ${apply.type@label}
        ${apply.refnum@label}
        ${apply.total@label}
        ${apply.due@label}
        ${apply.disc@label}
        ${apply.amount@label}
    

</#if>


${apply.applydate}
${apply.type}
${apply.refnum}
${apply.total}
${apply.due}
${apply.disc}
${apply.amount}

        </#if>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1>
        </#list>
        
<#list check.credit as credit>
<#if ctr < 11>


${credit.creditdate}
${credit.type}
${credit.refnum}
${credit.description}
(${credit.amount})
${credit.discamt}
(${credit.amount})

        </#if>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1>
        </#list>
        
        



    CHECK TOTAL:


    ${llrTotalDisc?string.currency}


    ${llrTotalAmt?string.currency}


<#if combinedLength gt 10>


Please see vendor remittance for complete list of bills

        </#if>
        
        </#if>

<#if check.item?has_content || check.expense?has_content>

<#list check.expense as expense>


    ${expense.account}
    ${expense.date}
    ${expense.description}
    ${expense.amount}

</#list>
<#list check.item as item>


 
${item.date}
${item.item}, ${item.description}
${item.amount}

        </#list>
        
        </#if>
        
        
        


  <#elseif check.subsidiary.id == "39"
    || check.subsidiary.id == "57"
    || check.subsidiary.id == "11"
    || check.subsidiary.id == "53"
    || check.subsidiary.id == "59"
    || check.subsidiary.id == "6">



  

    

        ${check.trandate}
    



    

        <#if (check.entity.companyname?has_content)>${check.entity.companyname}<#else>${check.entity}
        </#if>
    


          



    **
        <#if (check.usertotal?length> 0)>${check.usertotal?string['#,###,##0.00']}
        <#else>${check.total?string['#,###,##0.00']}
    </#if>


        




    ${check.totalwords}*********************************************************************
    






    <#if check.address?contains("United States")>${check.address?replace("United States","")}<#else>${check.address}
    </#if>


        
        






    

        
          <#if (check.entity.companyname?has_content)>${check.entity.companyname}<#else>${check.entity}</#if>
            
    



    

        ${check.trandate}
        
    



<#assign applyLength = check.apply?size>
<#assign creditLength = check.credit?size>
<#assign combinedLength = applyLength + creditLength>
<#assign ctr = 1>
<#assign otherTotalAmt = 0>
<#assign otherTotalDisc = 0>
<#list check.apply as apply>
<#assign otherTotalAmt = otherTotalAmt + nsformat_number(apply.total)>
<#assign otherTotalDisc = otherTotalDisc + nsformat_number(apply.disc)>
        </#list>
<#list check.credit as credit>
<#assign otherTotalAmt = otherTotalAmt - nsformat_number(credit.amount)>
<#assign otherTotalDisc = otherTotalDisc + nsformat_number(credit.discamt)>
        </#list>

<#if check.apply?has_content>


<#list check.apply as apply>
<#if ctr lt 11>
<#if apply_index==0>

    

        Date
        ${apply.type@label}
        Reference
        Original Amount
        Balance Due
        Payment
    

</#if>


${apply.applydate}
${apply.type}
${apply.refnum}
${apply.total}
${apply.due}
${(apply.total - apply.disc)?string.currency}

        </#if>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1>
        </#list>
          
<#list check.credit as credit>
<#if ctr lt 11>


${credit.creditdate}
${credit.type}
${credit.refnum}
${credit.description}
(${credit.amount})
(${credit.amount})

</#if>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1>
</#list>

    


Check Amount:

${(otherTotalAmt - otherTotalDisc)?string.currency}

<#if combinedLength gt 20>


Please see vendor remittance for complete list of bills

        </#if>
        
        </#if>

<#if check.item?has_content || check.expense?has_content>

<#list check.expense as expense>


    ${expense.account}
    ${expense.date}
    ${expense.description}
    ${expense.amount}

</#list>
<#list check.item as item>


 
${item.date}
${item.item}, ${item.description}
${item.amount}

        </#list>
        
        </#if>
        


  

    

        
          <#if (check.entity.companyname?has_content)>${check.entity.companyname}<#else>${check.entity}</#if>
        
    



    

        ${check.trandate}



<#assign applyLength = check.apply?size>
<#assign creditLength = check.credit?size>
<#assign combinedLength = applyLength + creditLength>
<#assign ctr = 1>
<#if check.apply?has_content>


<#list check.apply as apply>
<#if ctr lt 11>
<#if apply_index==0>

    

        Date
        ${apply.type@label}
        Reference
        Original Amount
        Balance Due
        Payment
    

</#if>
  


${apply.applydate}
${apply.type}
${apply.refnum}
${apply.total}
${apply.due}
${(apply.total - apply.disc)?string.currency}

</#if>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1>
</#list>
  
<#list check.credit as credit>
<#if ctr < 11>


${credit.creditdate}
${credit.type}
${credit.refnum}
${credit.description}
(${credit.amount})
(${credit.amount})

</#if>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1>
</#list>
  


Check Amount:

${(otherTotalAmt - otherTotalDisc)?string.currency}

  
<#if combinedLength gt 20>


Please see vendor remittance for complete list of bills

        </#if>
        
        </#if>

<#if check.item?has_content || check.expense?has_content>

<#list check.expense as expense>


    ${expense.account}
    ${expense.date}
    ${expense.description}
    ${expense.amount}

</#list>
<#list check.item as item>


 
${item.date}
${item.item}, ${item.description}
${item.amount}

        </#list>
        
        </#if>
        

  
<#else>


<#if check.account.id == "984" || check.account.id == "985">

    <#else>
    
    </#if>
    

        ${check.checknumber}
    


<#if check.account.id == "984" || check.account.id == "985">

    <#else>
    
    </#if>
    

        ${check.trandate}
    


<#if check.account.id == "984" || check.account.id == "985">

    <#else>
    
    </#if>
    

        <#if (check.entity.companyname?has_content)>${check.entity.companyname}<#else>${check.entity}
        </#if>
    


<#if check.account.id == "984" || check.account.id == "985">

<#else>

</#if>


    
        <#if (check.usertotal?length> 0)>${check.usertotal?string['#,###,##0.00']}
        <#else>${check.total?string['#,###,##0.00']}
    </#if>


        

<#if check.account.id == "984" || check.account.id == "985">

<#else>

</#if>


    ${check.totalwords}*********************************************************************
    



<#if check.account.id == "984" || check.account.id == "985">

<#else>

</#if>


    <#if check.address?contains("United States")>${check.address?replace("United States","")}<#else>${check.address}
    </#if>


        
        

<#if check.account.id == "984" || check.account.id == "985">


<#else>


</#if>

    

        ${check.checknumber}
    



    

        ${check.trandate}
    



    

        <#if (check.entity.companyname?has_content)>${check.entity.companyname}<#else>${check.entity}
        </#if>
    



<#assign applyLength = check.apply?size>
<#assign creditLength = check.credit?size>
<#assign combinedLength = applyLength + creditLength>
<#assign ctr = 1>
<#assign otherTotalAmt = 0>
<#assign otherTotalDisc = 0>
<#list check.apply as apply>
<#assign otherTotalAmt = otherTotalAmt + nsformat_number(apply.total)>
<#assign otherTotalDisc = otherTotalDisc + nsformat_number(apply.disc)>
        </#list>
<#list check.credit as credit>
<#assign otherTotalAmt = otherTotalAmt - nsformat_number(credit.amount)>
<#assign otherTotalDisc = otherTotalDisc + nsformat_number(credit.discamt)>
        </#list>

<#if check.apply?has_content>


<#list check.apply as apply>
<#if ctr lt 11>
<#if apply_index==0>

    <#if check.subsidiary.id == '15'>
    

        ${apply.applydate@label}
        ${apply.type@label}
        ${apply.refnum@label}
        ${apply.total@label}
        ${apply.disc@label}
        ${apply.amount@label}
    
    <#else>
    

        ${apply.applydate@label}
        ${apply.type@label}
        ${apply.refnum@label}
        ${apply.total@label}
        ${apply.due@label}
        ${apply.disc@label}
        ${apply.amount@label}
    
    </#if>

</#if>


${apply.applydate}
${apply.type}
${apply.refnum}
${apply.total}
<#if check.subsidiary.id != '15'>

    <#if check.subsidiary.id = '8'> ${apply.due}  <#else>
  ${(apply.total - apply.disc)?string.currency} </#if>
  
</#if>
${apply.disc}

  ${(apply.total - apply.disc)?string.currency}

        </#if>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1>
        </#list>
        
        

  <#if check.subsidiary.id = '15' || check.subsidiary.id = '8'>

<#-- Insert missing bill rows: remove "Bill #" before validating -->
<#assign appliedRefnums = []>

<#list check.apply as a>
    <#assign applyRef = (a.refnum!"")?string?trim?replace("^Bill\\s*#\\s*", "", "ri")>

    <#if applyRef?has_content>
        <#assign appliedRefnums = appliedRefnums + [applyRef]>
    </#if>
</#list>

<#assign missingBillAgg = {}>
<#assign missingBillDateMap = {}>

<#list check.credit as credit>
    <#assign creditAppliedTo = (credit.appliedto!"")?string?trim?replace("^Bill\\s*#\\s*", "", "ri")>

    <#if creditAppliedTo?has_content && !appliedRefnums?seq_contains(creditAppliedTo)>
        <#assign missingBillAmt = nsformat_number(credit.amount)>

        <#if missingBillAmt < 0>
            <#assign missingBillAmt = missingBillAmt * -1>
        </#if>

        <#if missingBillAgg?keys?seq_contains(creditAppliedTo)>
            <#assign missingBillAgg = missingBillAgg + {creditAppliedTo: missingBillAgg[creditAppliedTo] + missingBillAmt}>
        <#else>
            <#assign missingBillAgg = missingBillAgg + {creditAppliedTo: missingBillAmt}>
            <#assign missingBillDateMap = missingBillDateMap + {creditAppliedTo: credit.creditdate}>
        </#if>
    </#if>
</#list>

<#list missingBillAgg?keys as billRef>
    

        ${missingBillDateMap[billRef]}
        Bill
        ${billRef}
        <#if check.subsidiary.id != '15'>${nsformat_currency(missingBillAgg[billRef])}</#if>
        ${nsformat_currency(missingBillAgg[billRef])}
        
        <#assign otherTotalAmt = otherTotalAmt + missingBillAgg[billRef]>
        ${nsformat_currency(missingBillAgg[billRef])}
    

    <#assign appliedRefnums = appliedRefnums + [billRef]>
    <#assign ctr = ctr + 1>
</#list>

          <#list check.credit as credit>
<#if ctr < 11>


${credit.creditdate}
${credit.type}
${credit.refnum}
${credit.description}
<#if check.subsidiary.id != '15'>(${credit.amount})</#if>
${credit.discamt}
(${credit.amount})

        </#if>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1>
        </#list>
<#else>
<#list check.credit as credit>
<#if ctr lt 11>


${credit.creditdate}
${credit.type}
${credit.refnum}
${credit.description}
(${credit.amount})
${credit.discamt}
(${credit.amount})

        </#if>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1>
        </#list> </#if>
        
        

    


<td colspan="<#if check.subsidiary.id == '15'>4<#else>5</#if>">
    CHECK TOTAL:


    ${otherTotalDisc?string.currency}


    ${(otherTotalAmt - otherTotalDisc)?string.currency}


<#if combinedLength gt 20>


<td colspan="<#if check.subsidiary.id == '15'>7<#else>8</#if>" align="center">Please see vendor remittance for complete list of bills

        </#if>
        
        </#if>

<#if check.item?has_content || check.expense?has_content>

<#list check.expense as expense>


    ${expense.account}
    ${expense.date}
    ${expense.description}
    ${expense.amount}

</#list>
<#list check.item as item>


 
${item.date}
${item.item}, ${item.description}
${item.amount}

        </#list>
        
        </#if>
        
<#if check.account.id == "984" || check.account.id == "985">


<#else>


</#if>

    

        ${check.checknumber}
    



    

        ${check.trandate}
    



    

        <#if (check.entity.companyname?has_content)>${check.entity.companyname}<#else>${check.entity}
        </#if>
    



<#assign applyLength = check.apply?size>
<#assign creditLength = check.credit?size>
<#assign combinedLength = applyLength + creditLength>
<#assign ctr = 1>
<#if check.apply?has_content>


<#list check.apply as apply>
<#if ctr lt 11>
<#if apply_index==0>

    <#if check.subsidiary.id == '15'>
    

        ${apply.applydate@label}
        ${apply.type@label}
        ${apply.refnum@label}
        ${apply.total@label}
        ${apply.disc@label}
        ${apply.amount@label}
    
    <#else>
    

        ${apply.applydate@label}
        ${apply.type@label}
        ${apply.refnum@label}
        ${apply.total@label}
        ${apply.due@label}
        ${apply.disc@label}
        ${apply.amount@label}
    
    </#if>

</#if>


${apply.applydate}
${apply.type}
${apply.refnum}
${apply.total}
<#if check.subsidiary.id != '15'>

      <#if check.subsidiary.id = '8'> ${apply.due}  <#else>
  ${(apply.total - apply.disc)?string.currency} </#if>

</#if>
${apply.disc}
${(apply.total - apply.disc)?string.currency}

        </#if>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1>
        </#list>
        
<#if check.subsidiary.id = '15' || check.subsidiary.id = '8'>
  <#-- Insert missing bill rows: remove "Bill #" before validating -->
<#assign appliedRefnums = []>

<#list check.apply as a>
    <#assign applyRef = (a.refnum!"")?string?trim?replace("^Bill\\s*#\\s*", "", "ri")>

    <#if applyRef?has_content>
        <#assign appliedRefnums = appliedRefnums + [applyRef]>
    </#if>
</#list>

<#assign missingBillAgg = {}>
<#assign missingBillDateMap = {}>

<#list check.credit as credit>
    <#assign creditAppliedTo = (credit.appliedto!"")?string?trim?replace("^Bill\\s*#\\s*", "", "ri")>

    <#if creditAppliedTo?has_content && !appliedRefnums?seq_contains(creditAppliedTo)>
        <#assign missingBillAmt = nsformat_number(credit.amount)>

        <#if missingBillAmt < 0>
            <#assign missingBillAmt = missingBillAmt * -1>
        </#if>

        <#if missingBillAgg?keys?seq_contains(creditAppliedTo)>
            <#assign missingBillAgg = missingBillAgg + {creditAppliedTo: missingBillAgg[creditAppliedTo] + missingBillAmt}>
        <#else>
            <#assign missingBillAgg = missingBillAgg + {creditAppliedTo: missingBillAmt}>
            <#assign missingBillDateMap = missingBillDateMap + {creditAppliedTo: credit.creditdate}>
        </#if>
    </#if>
</#list>

<#list missingBillAgg?keys as billRef>
    

        ${missingBillDateMap[billRef]}
        Bill
        ${billRef}
        <#if check.subsidiary.id != '15'>${nsformat_currency(missingBillAgg[billRef])}</#if>
        ${nsformat_currency(missingBillAgg[billRef])}
        
        ${nsformat_currency(missingBillAgg[billRef])}
    

    <#assign appliedRefnums = appliedRefnums + [billRef]>
    <#assign ctr = ctr + 1>
</#list>


          <#list check.credit as credit>
<#if ctr < 11>


${credit.creditdate}
${credit.type}
${credit.refnum}
${credit.description}
<#if check.subsidiary.id != '15'>(${credit.amount})</#if>
${credit.discamt}
(${credit.amount})

        </#if>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1>
        </#list>
  
<#else>          
<#list check.credit as credit>
<#if ctr < 11>


${credit.creditdate}
${credit.type}
${credit.refnum}
${credit.description}
(${credit.amount})
${credit.discamt}
(${credit.amount})

        </#if>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1>
        </#list></#if>
        
        


<td colspan="<#if check.subsidiary.id == '15'>4<#else>5</#if>">

    CHECK TOTAL:


    ${otherTotalDisc?string.currency}


    ${(otherTotalAmt - otherTotalDisc)?string.currency}


<#if combinedLength gt 20>


<td colspan="<#if check.subsidiary.id == '15'>7<#else>8</#if>" align="center">Please see vendor remittance for complete list of bills

        </#if>
        
        </#if>

<#if check.item?has_content || check.expense?has_content>

<#list check.expense as expense>


    ${expense.account}
    ${expense.date}
    ${expense.description}
    ${expense.amount}

</#list>
<#list check.item as item>


 
${item.date}
${item.item}, ${item.description}
${item.amount}

        </#list>
        
        </#if>
        
        </#if>
        </#list>

        
<#list records as check>
<#if check.subsidiary.id == '19'>



<#assign ctr = 0 />
<#list check.apply as apply>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1 />
        </#list>
<#list check.credit as credit>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1 />
        </#list>

<#if ctr gt 10>



    

        ${check.checknumber}
    



    

        ${check.trandate}
    



<#assign applyLength = check.apply?size>
<#assign creditLength = check.credit?size>
<#assign combinedLength = applyLength + creditLength>

<#assign totalCheckAmt = 0>
<#assign totalCredits = 0>
<#assign totalDisc = 0>

<#if check.apply?has_content || check.credit?has_content>



<#list check.apply?sort_by('refnum') as apply>
<#if apply_index==0>

    

        TRX No
        Invoice No
        Inv Date Job/Description
        Applied To
        Discount
        Credits
        Check Amount
    

</#if>



${apply.doc}
${apply.refnum}

    ${apply.applydate}
    <#if apply.installmentnumber?has_content>-${apply.installmentnumber}</#if>

 
${apply.disc}
 
${apply.amount}

<#assign totalCheckAmt = totalCheckAmt + nsformat_number(apply.amount)>
<#assign totalDisc = totalDisc + nsformat_number(apply.disc)>
        
        </#list>
        

        
<#list check.credit?sort_by('appliedto') as credit>


${credit.doc}
${credit.refnum}
${credit.creditdate} ${credit.memo}
${credit.appliedto}
${credit.discamt}



    <#if nsformat_number(credit.amount) gt 0>-</#if>${credit.amount}


        
 

<#assign totalCredits = totalCredits + nsformat_number(credit.amount)>
<#assign totalDisc = totalDisc + nsformat_number(credit.discamt)>
        
        </#list>

        



    CONTINUATION SHEET TOTAL:


    ${totalDisc?string.currency}


    ${totalCredits?string.currency}


    ${(totalCheckAmt)?string.currency}


        
        </#if>
        </#if>



















<#elseif check.subsidiary.id == '20'>









<#assign ctr = 0 />
<#assign applyTotal = 0>
<#assign creditTotal = 0>
<#list check.apply as apply>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1 />
<#assign applyTotal += apply.amount>
        </#list>
<#list check.credit as credit>
<#assign ctr = ctr + 1 />
<#assign creditTotal += credit.amount>
        </#list>
<#if ctr gt 8>



    

        ${check.tranid}
    



    

        ${check.trandate}
    



    

        <#if (check.entity.companyname?has_content)>${check.entity.companyname}<#else>${check.entity}
        </#if>
    


        
<#assign applyLength = check.apply?size>
<#assign creditLength = check.credit?size>
<#assign combinedLength = applyLength + creditLength>
<#assign totalAmt = 0>
<#assign totalDisc = 0>

<#if check.apply?has_content || check.credit?has_content>


<#list check.apply as apply>
<#if apply_index==0>

    

        ${apply.applydate@label}
        ${apply.type@label}
        ${apply.refnum@label}
        Amount
        
        ${apply.disc@label}
        Due After Discount
    

</#if>


${apply.applydate}
${apply.type}
${apply.refnum}
${apply.total}

${apply.disc}
${apply.amount}

        </#list>




    BILL TOTAL:

 

    ${applyTotal?string.currency}



        
<#list check.credit as credit>
<#if credit_index == 0>


${credit.creditdate@label}
${credit.type@label}
${credit.refnum@label}
Open CM Amount

        </#if>


${credit.creditdate}
${credit.type}
${credit.refnum}
(${credit.amount})

        </#list>
        



    CONTINUATION SHEET TOTAL:


    ${totalDisc?string.currency}


    ${totalAmt?string.currency}





    CREDIT MEMO TOTAL:


     


    ${creditTotal?string.currency}





    CHECK AMOUNT ROW:


     


    ${(applyTotal-creditTotal)?string.currency}


        
        </#if>
        </#if>





        </#if>
        </#list>
